name: Accordion
description: Configuration for a single accordion item.

name: Badge
description: Badge component for status indicators, counts, and labels with multiple variants.

name: Box
description: Versatile layout primitive with comprehensive styling props. Supports polymorphic rendering, spacing tokens, and hover states.

name: Button
description: Accessible button component with multiple visual variants, sizes, and loading state. Built on Kobalte for ARIA compliance.

name: Card
description: Container component with multiple visual variants, optional padding, and hover/click states. Composed of Header, Title, Description, Content, and Footer sub-components.

name: Center
description: Props for the Center component (inherits all FlexProps)

name: Dialog
description: Modal dialog component with overlay, title, description, and close button.

name: Dropdown
description: Dropdown menu component with customizable trigger and menu items.

name: ErrorBanner
description: Visual style variants for the banner.

name: Flex
description: Flexbox layout primitive extending Box. Provides convenient props for flex direction, alignment, justification, and gap.

name: ImagePreview
description: Configuration for a single image preview item.

name: Input
description: Text input component with built-in error display and accessibility features.

name: MediaGrid
description: Configuration for a single media grid item.

name: Section
description: Full-width section container with background variants and optional inner content constraint.

name: Select
description: Dropdown select component with searchable options and keyboard navigation support.

name: Slider
description: Single-handle slider with label, value display, and step control.

name: SuggestionChips
description: Configuration for a single suggestion chip.

name: Table
description: Configuration for a single table column.

name: TagInput
description: Tag input with autocomplete suggestions, duplicate prevention, and keyboard shortcuts.

name: Text
description: Typography primitive for rendering text with theme-aware font sizes, weights, and colors. Supports truncation, gradient text, and polymorphic rendering.

name: Timeline
description: Configuration for a single timeline step.
